About Nealco Electrical Services, LLC

12+ years serving Austin and surrounding areas

Nealco Electrical Services, LLC, was founded over a decade ago by master electrician, Robert Neal. Seeing a need for dependable and honest electrical work in the rapidly growing Austin area, Robert set out to build a company based on those principles.

We believe in doing the job right the first time, every time. Our team is committed to clear communication, upfront pricing, and exceeding expectations. We use only quality materials and stay up-to-date with the latest electrical codes and safety standards.

As Austinites ourselves, we're invested in the well-being of our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to be a responsible and ethical business partner for our neighbors.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Nealco Electrical Services, LLC

Trusted electrical contractor professionals serving Austin, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
